title: Mxthy's ITALIAN BRAINROT
description: a mod created with geckolib plugin that adds the italian brainrot character
body:
# **The Mxthy's Italian Brainrot adds mob/creature from the famous memes of the italian brainrot stories**


###  🚀need [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)


 **This will be a long-term project bcs I am very busy with the school and I am a lil inexpert**



👾Created using blockbench with the geckolib plugin and MCreator

## 💥Entities

###  🌳 v 1.0 Adds BrBrrPatapim with is unique animation!🌳
![Bbr br Patapim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05247f5e6768d02473d0a91abb4d35c94e59d231_0.webp)

### 🌴 v 1.1 adds Tung Tung Tung Sahur and his mace, with is unique animation!🌴

![tung tung tung tung sahur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2cf6e32792abebfa055d92582dcc39d51424b9_0.webp)
![mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec54262c2cddf57dcb2ee6dac6c7b71e79eeb1be.png)

### 🍉 v 1.2 adds Glorbo Frutto Drillo with is unique animation! 🍈





![glorbofruttodrillo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9e9fd4168dfc602c8bf95b0f7758df159ab3f73_0.webp)

## 💫Future entities!
oneca ambalabu

Vacca saturno saturnita

glorbo fruttodrillo

frulli frulla

bobrito bandito

trulimero trulicina

TungtungtungtungSahur

crocodildo penissini

cocofanto elefanto

gangsterfootera

cappuccino assassino

SPIONIRU GOLUBIRU

lirili larila

and other ones





**This is a work in progress mod, it can be updated in every moment**



# ⚙️Disclaimer

**I started this project 1 month ago and there were no other mods so mine IT'S NOT a copy of other ones, this is MY PERSONAL project** 

**🌪️I hope you like it, feedback are well accessed and here is a link where you can report me any kind of issue** 
https://github.com/Mxthy7/MXTHY-S-ITALIAN-BRAINROT
